ranked_movies.title: Children of Men
ranked_movies.reason: Most discussed film across the threads, with a dedicated post and extensive comments. Universally praised as a masterpiece.

ranked_movies.title: Gattaca
ranked_movies.reason: Second most discussed, with its own post and high praise for its themes and execution.

ranked_movies.title: Dancer in the Dark
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as the definitive answer to 'movies that will destroy you', making it one of the most recommended for emotional impact.

ranked_movies.title: Synecdoche, New York
ranked_movies.reason: Similarly cited as profoundly affecting, alongside Dancer in the Dark.

ranked_movies.title: The Station Agent
ranked_movies.reason: Featured as a direct recommendation for the type of movie the OP seeks, increasing its visibility.

ranked_movies.title: Paris, Texas
ranked_movies.reason: Another example of the human-focused filmmaking sought by the OP.

ranked_movies.title: As Good as It Gets
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned in the same context as The Station Agent and Paris, Texas.

ranked_movies.title: Manchester by the Sea
ranked_movies.reason: Cited alongside Dancer in the Dark as a emotionally devastating film.

ranked_movies.title: Requiem for a Dream
ranked_movies.reason: Another classic example of a hard-hitting film.

ranked_movies.title: The Shining
ranked_movies.reason: Subject of a in-depth analysis post, though less directly recommended than others.

ranked_movies.title: My Own Private Idaho
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned in passing, but notable for its cultural impact.

ranked_movies.title: The Master
ranked_movies.reason: Part of PTA's filmography discussed in the context of One Battle After Another.

ranked_movies.title: There Will Be Blood
ranked_movies.reason: Another PTA film noted for its scope and ambition.

ranked_movies.title: Inherent Vice
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned in the context of Pynchon adaptations and One Battle After Another.

ranked_movies.title: Bullitt
ranked_movies.reason: Referenced in the context of car chases and classic cinema.

ranked_movies.title: The French Connection
ranked_movies.reason: Another classic noted for its chase sequences.

ranked_movies.title: Tinker Tailor Soldier Spy
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a example of a complex, realistic spy film.

ranked_movies.title: The Act of Killing
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted as a disturbing and impactful documentary.

ranked_movies.title: Threads
ranked_movies.reason: Noted as one of the most harrowing viewing experiences.

ranked_movies.title: Good Will Hunting
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned in the context of films with deep human moments, though less discussed than others.
